prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Use the latest DGA record for transformer T-012 to identify the most likely fault mode and explain the top two candidate failure mechanisms.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should map DGA evidence to a primary fault mode and provide at least one alternative candidate with rationale grounded in gas patterns or known fault mapping.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "analyze_dga",
        "arguments": {
          "h2": 1234,
          "ch4": 456,
          "c2h2": 789,
          "c2h4": 234,
          "c2h6": 567,
          "transformer_id": "T-012"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-bea746b7808d86bc",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"iec_code\": \"N\",\n  \"diagnosis\": \"Normal / Inconclusive\",\n  \"r1_ch4_h2\": 0.3695,\n  \"r2_c2h2_c2h4\": 3.3718,\n  \"r3_c2h4_c2h6\": 0.4127,\n  \"input_gases\": {\n    \"h2_ppm\": 1234.0,\n    \"ch4_ppm\": 456.0,\n    \"c2h2_ppm\": 789.0,\n    \"c2h4_ppm\": 234.0,\n    \"c2h6_ppm\": 567.0\n  },\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-012\"\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The most likely fault mode for transformer T-012 based on the latest DGA record is \"Normal / Inconclusive\" with an IEC code of \"N\". The top two candidate failure mechanisms are:\n\n1. Normal / Inconclusive: This diagnosis indicates that the DGA readings do not provide enough information to determine the cause of the fault. The ratio values (r1_ch4_h2, r2_c2h2_c2h4, r3_c2h4_c2h6) are within normal ranges, suggesting that the transformer is not experiencing any abnormal conditions.\n2. No indication of faults (DGA ratios and gas concentrations within normal or inconclusive ranges): The DGA ratios and gas concentrations are within normal or inconclusive ranges, indicating that the transformer is not experiencing any abnormal conditions. However, this diagnosis does not provide any information about the cause of the fault, and further analysis or maintenance may be required to determine the root cause.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The most likely fault mode for transformer T-012 based on the latest DGA record is "Normal / Inconclusive" with an IEC code of "N". The top two candidate failure mechanisms are:

1. Normal / Inconclusive: This diagnosis indicates that the DGA readings do not provide enough information to determine the cause of the fault. The ratio values (r1_ch4_h2, r2_c2h2_c2h4, r3_c2h4_c2h6) are within normal ranges, suggesting that the transformer is not experiencing any abnormal conditions.
2. No indication of faults (DGA ratios and gas concentrations within normal or inconclusive ranges): The DGA ratios and gas concentrations are within normal or inconclusive ranges, indicating that the transformer is not experiencing any abnormal conditions. However, this diagnosis does not provide any information about the cause of the fault, and further analysis or maintenance may be required to determine the root cause.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": true, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": true, "suggestions": "Provide more specific failure mechanisms based on DGA ratios and verify results against known fault mappings"}
